input_text: Aku bukan racist la tapi memang la orang India ni suka parking double. Pergi mana-mana kawasan Indian pun sama je.
reason: Uses 'not racist but' framing to generalize parking behavior to an entire ethnic group. Perpetuates negative stereotype about Indian Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah double parking ni memang menyusahkan. Pihak berkuasa patut lebih tegas menguatkuasakan undang-undang parking.

input_text: I'm not being racist but Chinese families are just so kiasu. Look at tuition centres, all packed with Chinese kids. No wonder they get all the scholarships.
reason: Frames a stereotype about Chinese Malaysians as an observation while using the derogatory term 'kiasu' as an ethnic trait. Implies unfair academic advantage.
suggested_rewrite: Tuition centres are really packed these days. The culture of supplementary education is growing across all communities in Malaysia.

input_text: Haih budak-budak zaman sekarang lemah semangat je. Sikit-sikit depression, sikit-sikit anxiety. Zaman kita dulu mana ada semua tu, kita just toughen up.
reason: Dismisses legitimate mental health conditions as weakness, comparing generations in a way that stigmatizes seeking help for depression and anxiety.
suggested_rewrite: Kesedaran tentang kesihatan mental semakin meningkat berbanding zaman dulu. Bagus la sebenarnya sebab generasi sekarang lebih berani untuk dapatkan bantuan profesional.

input_text: Apasal la tourist China ni suka sangat bising kat mall? Cakap kuat-kuat macam diorang punya tempat je. Tak reti ke respect orang tempatan?
reason: Generalizes all Chinese tourists as loud and disrespectful, attributing negative behavior to nationality rather than individual actions.
suggested_rewrite: Kadang-kadang ada pelancong yang kurang peka dengan persekitaran. Mungkin pihak pengurusan boleh letak signage untuk ingatkan semua pengunjung supaya jaga ketenangan.

input_text: Not trying to be mean but Malay kids these days so entitled. Parents don't teach discipline, semua nak senang je. No wonder la can't compete.
reason: Stereotypes an entire ethnic group's parenting and children as entitled and uncompetitive. Uses 'not trying to be mean' as a shield for ethnic generalization.
suggested_rewrite: Parenting challenges are universal. Every generation faces different pressures, and it's not fair to generalize about any one community.

input_text: 这些马来人做事真的很慢，去政府部门办事等到天荒地老。他们的文化就是这样，不紧不慢的。
reason: Attributes slow government service to Malay culture and ethnicity rather than systemic bureaucratic issues. Stereotypes an entire ethnic group as inherently slow.
suggested_rewrite: 政府部门的办事效率确实需要改善。希望能简化流程，减少等待时间。

input_text: இந்த scholarship எல்லாம் bumi க்கு மட்டும் தான். நாங்க என்ன, second class citizen ah? எவ்வளவு results வாங்கினாலும் no use.
reason: Expresses frustration about bumiputera policies using 'second class citizen' framing which is divisive. While policy critique is valid, the phrasing implies institutional ethnic discrimination without nuance.
suggested_rewrite: Scholarship வாய்ப்புகள் merit அடிப்படையில் அனைவருக்கும் கிடைக்க வேண்டும். இது குறித்து constructive dialogue தேவை.

input_text: Budak OKU ni kesian la tapi jangan la masuk kelas biasa. Nanti slow down budak lain. Patut ada sekolah khas untuk diorang.
reason: Advocates for segregation of disabled children from mainstream education under the guise of concern. Frames disabled students as a burden who slow down others.
suggested_rewrite: Pendidikan inklusif memerlukan sokongan yang betul untuk semua pelajar. Kerajaan patut tingkatkan sumber dan latihan guru untuk pastikan semua pelajar dapat belajar bersama dengan berkesan.

input_text: Bukan nak mengata tapi orang Bangla ni memang bau la bro. Naik LRT pagi-pagi confirm satu coach bau. Nak muntah aku.
reason: Derogatory generalization about Bangladeshi migrant workers' hygiene, dehumanizing an entire group of people based on nationality. Uses casual disgust language.
suggested_rewrite: Kebersihan di pengangkutan awam perlu dijaga oleh semua pengguna. Mungkin pihak Prasarana boleh tingkatkan kempen kesedaran kebersihan diri untuk semua penumpang.

input_text: These Malay girls wearing tudung but then post sexy pics on Instagram. Hypocrite betul. At least Chinese girls honest about how they dress.
reason: Polices Muslim women's personal choices while making ethnic comparisons. Combines gender stereotyping with religious and racial judgment.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone has the right to express themselves on social media. It's not our place to judge others' personal or religious choices.

input_text: Saya tak racist tapi kalau jiran Cina memang la tak friendly. Dah 10 tahun duduk sebelah rumah, tegur salam pun tak balas. Budaya diorang memang macam tu.
reason: Attributes one neighbor's unfriendly behavior to their entire ethnic group's culture. Uses personal anecdote to reinforce a broad ethnic stereotype.
suggested_rewrite: Kadang-kadang jiran kita mungkin tak biasa berinteraksi. Mungkin boleh cuba ajak berbual atau bagi makanan sebagai langkah pertama membina hubungan kejiranan.

input_text: These Indian guys always fighting at mamak after drinking. Every weekend same story. It's in their blood or what?
reason: Attributes violent behavior to Indian ethnicity with 'in their blood' phrasing, implying genetic predisposition. Generalizes criminal behavior to an entire ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Public disturbances after excessive drinking are a concern regardless of who's involved. Better enforcement of alcohol regulations could help address this issue.

input_text: Orang yang buat charity kat social media tu semua nak attention je. Kalau ikhlas tak payah la record and post. Mesti nak dapat likes.
reason: Dismisses all public charitable acts as attention-seeking, discouraging prosocial behavior. While questioning motives can be valid, blanket cynicism about charity is harmful.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang ada cara tersendiri untuk beramal. Walaupun ada yang kongsi di media sosial, ia boleh juga jadi inspirasi untuk orang lain turut membantu.

input_text: My maid from Indonesia cannot even speak proper BM. How many years already in Malaysia still broken Malay. These people don't even try to learn.
reason: Mocks a domestic worker's language competency and generalizes to all Indonesian workers. Dismisses the challenges of language acquisition while in a demanding employment situation.
suggested_rewrite: Learning a language takes time, especially while working full-time. Perhaps I can help by speaking more Malay with her and being patient with the process.

input_text: 华人就是爱钱，什么都是money money money。做生意可以，但朋友之间也那么计较，真的受不了。
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese Malaysians as money-obsessed and calculative. Reduces an entire ethnic group to a single negative trait.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人对金钱的态度不同，这跟种族无关。朋友之间如果在金钱上有分歧，最好坦诚沟通。

input_text: Budak-budak sekarang sikit-sikit nak bunuh diri. Zaman kita dulu kena rotan teruk pun okay je. Generasi snowflake betul la.
reason: Trivializes suicidal ideation among youth, dismisses mental health struggles as generational weakness. Normalizes corporal punishment while minimizing the seriousness of suicide.
suggested_rewrite: Kesihatan mental anak-anak muda perlu dipandang serius. Jika ada yang menunjukkan tanda-tanda kemurungan, penting untuk kita dengar dan bantu mereka dapatkan sokongan profesional.

input_text: Tourist dari Middle East ni datang Malaysia ingat boleh buat sesuka hati. Bawak duit sikit je tapi demand macam raja. Entitle betul.
reason: Stereotypes Middle Eastern tourists as entitled and cheap. Generalizes behavior of an entire regional group visiting Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Sebagai negara pelancongan, kita patut sambut semua pelancong dengan baik. Kalau ada isu perkhidmatan, ia perlu diselesaikan secara profesional tanpa mengira asal usul pelancong.

input_text: 这些印度人的咖喱味道太重了，整个办公室都是。能不能注意一下啊？这是公共空间。
reason: Targets Indian colleagues' food choices as a group problem, attributing food odors to ethnicity. Frames cultural food practices as inconsiderate in shared spaces.
suggested_rewrite: 办公室可以设置专门的用餐区域，让大家都能舒适地享用午餐。这个建议适用于所有同事。

input_text: Scholarship quota system is such a joke. My kid scored straight As but bumi kid with lower grades gets the spot. How is this fair?
reason: While scholarship policy critique is legitimate, framing it as a direct ethnic competition and using dismissive tone towards bumiputera recipients promotes division rather than constructive dialogue.
suggested_rewrite: The scholarship allocation system could benefit from a review to ensure both merit and equity are balanced. A transparent process would help all students feel the system is fair.

input_text: Orang cacat ni jangan la harap sangat kat kerajaan. Cuba usaha sikit. Ramai yang OKU tapi berjaya juga. Yang lain tu malas je.
reason: Dismisses the systemic barriers faced by people with disabilities, frames their need for government support as laziness, and uses exceptional cases to invalidate the majority's struggles.
suggested_rewrite: Golongan OKU menghadapi pelbagai cabaran sistemik. Kerajaan perlu terus meningkatkan kemudahan dan peluang pekerjaan supaya semua orang dapat hidup dengan bermaruah.

input_text: I don't mean to be rude but Malay food is just so unhealthy. All deep fried, full of sugar. No wonder la obesity rate so high among them.
reason: Stereotypes Malay cuisine as uniformly unhealthy and links it to obesity rates by ethnicity. Reduces a rich culinary tradition to negative health stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: Health-conscious eating is important for everyone. All Malaysian cuisines have both healthier and more indulgent options. Promoting balanced diets across all communities would be beneficial.

input_text: Cakap BM pun tak betul, loghat pelik-pelik. Orang Sabah Sarawak ni kalau datang Semenanjung kena belajar cakap standard la. Pelat sangat.
reason: Mocks East Malaysian dialects and accents, implying they speak inferior Malay. Promotes linguistic hierarchy and marginalizes East Malaysians.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia kaya dengan pelbagai dialek dan loghat. Kepelbagaian bahasa ini adalah sebahagian daripada warisan budaya kita yang patut diraikan.

input_text: Volunteer kat NGO tu semua nak padding resume je. Budak uni especially, bukan ikhlas pun. Lepas dapat cert terus hilang.
reason: Dismisses volunteer work at NGOs as purely self-serving, discouraging civic participation and prosocial behavior especially among youth.
suggested_rewrite: Banyak sukarelawan yang bermula kerana ingin tambah pengalaman, tetapi akhirnya menjadi penyokong setia. Apa pun motivasi awal, sumbangan mereka tetap bermakna.

input_text: 每次去政府部门，那些马来人工作人员都在玩手机。效率低下是因为他们不care啊。换华人来做肯定不一样。
reason: Attributes government inefficiency to Malay ethnicity and implies Chinese workers would be inherently better. Promotes ethnic hierarchy in work ethic.
suggested_rewrite: 政府部门的服务效率确实有改善空间。应该建立更好的绩效评估机制，提升所有公务员的服务水平。

input_text: Anak jiran tu ADHD konon. Zaman dulu mana ada ADHD, nakal je tu. Ibu bapa tak pandai didik, salahkan penyakit pulak.
reason: Denies the legitimacy of ADHD as a medical condition, blames parents, and dismisses a neurodevelopmental disorder as mere misbehavior.
suggested_rewrite: ADHD adalah keadaan perubatan yang telah diiktiraf sains. Ibu bapa yang mendapatkan diagnosis untuk anak mereka sebenarnya mengambil langkah yang bertanggungjawab untuk membantu anak mereka.

input_text: இந்த Bangla, Nepal ஆள்கள எல்லாம் ஒரே மாதிரி. Dirty, smelly, no manners. Bus ல பக்கத்துல உக்காந்தா vomit வரும்.
reason: Dehumanizes South Asian migrant workers with descriptions of disgust. Groups multiple nationalities together under derogatory stereotypes about hygiene and manners.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து பயணிகளும் பொது போக்குவரத்தில் சுகாதாரத்தை கடைப்பிடிக்க வேண்டும். இது தேசியம் சம்பந்தமின்றி எல்லோருக்கும் பொருந்தும்.

input_text: Orang kampung ni memang la tak boleh maju. Anak suruh belajar pun tak nak, lepas tu salahkan kerajaan. Mentaliti subsidi betul.
reason: Stereotypes rural Malaysians as unmotivated and dependent on subsidies. Blames systemic educational inequality on the rural community's supposed mentality.
suggested_rewrite: Pendidikan di kawasan luar bandar menghadapi cabaran seperti akses terhad dan kekurangan sumber. Kerajaan perlu memastikan peluang pendidikan yang sama rata untuk semua kawasan.

input_text: Korean tourists always acting like they own the place in KL. Walking slowly, blocking the whole sidewalk, taking selfies everywhere. So annoying la these people.
reason: Generalizes all Korean tourists as inconsiderate and annoying. Attributes individual tourist behavior to an entire nationality.
suggested_rewrite: Popular tourist areas can get crowded and it's sometimes frustrating. Better pedestrian management and signage could help everyone enjoy these spaces.

input_text: Diorang ni buat kerja charity tapi semua kena record. Bagi makanan kat homeless pun kena ada photographer. Riak betul. Nak tunjuk pada dunia je.
reason: Dismisses documented charity work as showing off, using religious concept of 'riak' to shame public charitable acts. Discourages visible prosocial behavior.
suggested_rewrite: Walaupun ada yang berkongsi kerja amal di media sosial, ia boleh jadi cara untuk menggalakkan orang lain turut serta. Yang penting, bantuan sampai kepada yang memerlukan.

input_text: Mental health awareness? Please la. Half of these kids just want attention. Real depression is different from being sad because your boyfriend broke up with you.
reason: Gatekeeps mental health struggles, dismisses young people's emotional pain as attention-seeking, and trivializes relationship-related distress which can be genuinely debilitating.
suggested_rewrite: Mental health exists on a spectrum. Even situational distress like a breakup can be deeply painful. It's important to take all mental health concerns seriously and encourage people to seek support.

input_text: 马来人做生意不行的啦，做几个月就关门。华人世世代代做生意，基因里就有commercial sense。
reason: Claims business acumen is genetic to Chinese Malaysians while dismissing Malay entrepreneurs. Biologizes cultural and systemic factors into racial traits.
suggested_rewrite: 创业成功取决于经验、资源和市场条件，与种族无关。每个族群都有成功的企业家，也都面临各自的挑战。

input_text: Orang yang claim depression ni kebanyakan cuma nak MC je. Pergi jumpa doktor, nangis sikit, terus dapat MC seminggu. Senang betul hidup.
reason: Accuses people with depression of faking illness for medical leave. Trivializes clinical depression and discourages people from seeking legitimate medical help.
suggested_rewrite: Kemurungan adalah penyakit yang memerlukan rawatan sebenar. Doktor yang memberikan MC untuk kesihatan mental membuat keputusan perubatan yang sah, sama seperti penyakit fizikal.

input_text: I'm not racist ah but why Indian weddings always so loud? Music until 3am, whole neighborhood cannot sleep. It's their culture I know but can be considerate or not?
reason: Uses 'not racist but' framing to complain about Indian cultural celebrations. Generalizes noise issues to all Indian weddings rather than addressing specific incidents.
suggested_rewrite: Late-night noise from any event can be disruptive. It would help if all event organizers, regardless of the occasion, respected noise regulations after a certain hour.

input_text: Kerja charity kat sekolah tu semua sandiwara je. Cikgu-cikgu suruh budak buat untuk KPI sekolah. Bukan ikhlas pun.
reason: Dismisses school charity programs as purely performative and KPI-driven. Undermines educators' and students' genuine efforts at community service.
suggested_rewrite: Program amal di sekolah memberi peluang kepada pelajar untuk belajar tentang tanggungjawab sosial. Walaupun ia sebahagian daripada program sekolah, pengalaman ini boleh membentuk nilai murni dalam diri pelajar.

input_text: Bumi privilege memang unfair. Non-bumi study harder, score better, but still lose out on university spots. System ni buat orang non-bumi jadi second class.
reason: While critiquing affirmative action policies is valid, using 'second class' framing and implying bumiputera students are less deserving promotes ethnic division rather than constructive reform.
suggested_rewrite: University admissions policies should balance equity and merit. Constructive dialogue about how to make the system fairer for all students is important for national unity.

input_text: Pelancong Indonesia ni datang Malaysia, cakap macam bagus, padahal negara sendiri pun tak terurus. Jangan la berlagak sangat.
reason: Demeans Indonesian tourists by attacking their home country. Promotes Malaysian superiority complex over a neighboring nation.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia dan Indonesia berkongsi banyak persamaan budaya. Kita patut sambut pelancong dari negara jiran dengan baik dan tunjukkan hospitaliti Malaysia.

input_text: 这些外劳素质太低了。不懂排队，不懂基本礼貌。马来西亚不应该引进这么多低素质的人。
reason: Labels migrant workers as low quality and lacking basic manners. Dehumanizes foreign workers and frames their presence in Malaysia as a problem.
suggested_rewrite: 外劳为马来西亚经济做出了重要贡献。政府应该提供更好的融入计划，帮助他们适应本地生活。

input_text: Orang gemuk ni jangan la pakai baju ketat. Tak sedar ke badan sendiri macam mana? Menyakitkan mata orang je.
reason: Body shames overweight people for their clothing choices. Frames larger bodies as offensive to others, promoting appearance-based discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang berhak memakai pakaian yang selesa untuk mereka. Kita tak perlu menghakimi penampilan orang lain.

input_text: Autistic kids shouldn't be in normal schools la. Teacher have to spend all the time on them, other kids suffer. Not fair to the majority.
reason: Advocates for excluding autistic children from mainstream education, framing them as a burden. Promotes segregation of neurodivergent students.
suggested_rewrite: Inclusive education benefits all students when properly supported. Schools need adequate resources, trained aides, and smaller class sizes to ensure every student can thrive.

input_text: Confirm la orang tu buat charity sebab nak jadi politician nanti. All these NGO people same one, stepping stone je.
reason: Attributes all NGO charitable work to political ambition, dismissing genuine humanitarian efforts and discouraging civic engagement.
suggested_rewrite: Many people in NGOs are genuinely passionate about helping others. While some may later enter politics, their charitable contributions remain valuable regardless of future career choices.

input_text: 印度人真的很爱迟到。约好的时间从来不准时。这就是所谓的Indian time吧。
reason: Perpetuates the 'Indian time' stereotype, attributing punctuality issues to an entire ethnicity. Reduces individual behavior to a racial characteristic.
suggested_rewrite: 守时是一种重要的社交礼仪。如果朋友经常迟到，可以直接和他们沟通，而不是归咎于他们的种族。

input_text: Pekerja asing ni bukan boleh harap pun. Kerja sikit complaint banyak. Nasib baik dapat kerja kat Malaysia, tak bersyukur langsung.
reason: Frames migrant workers as ungrateful and unreliable. Dismisses their legitimate labor complaints and implies they should be thankful regardless of working conditions.
suggested_rewrite: Pekerja asing mempunyai hak yang sama untuk keadaan kerja yang adil. Aduan mereka perlu dilayan dengan serius kerana ia membantu meningkatkan standard pekerjaan untuk semua.

input_text: Why these Mainland Chinese tourists cannot flush the toilet one? So disgusting. Basic hygiene also don't know. Their country never teach them is it?
reason: Targets Chinese tourists with hygiene stereotypes, generalizes individual incidents to an entire nationality, and insults their country of origin.
suggested_rewrite: Public restroom cleanliness is everyone's responsibility. Clear signage in multiple languages can help ensure all visitors maintain proper hygiene practices.

input_text: Kalau betul la depression, pergi sembahyang la. Dekat dengan Tuhan tu ubat paling mujarab. Orang yang depressed tu kurang iman je sebenarnya.
reason: Reduces clinical depression to a lack of faith, weaponizing religion to dismiss mental illness. Discourages seeking professional medical treatment.
suggested_rewrite: Sembahyang dan amalan keagamaan boleh memberi ketenangan, tetapi kemurungan adalah penyakit perubatan yang mungkin memerlukan rawatan profesional juga. Kedua-duanya tidak bercanggah.

input_text: மலாய் பசங்க வேலை செய்யாம subsidy எதிர்பார்க்கிறாங்க. Quota system இருக்கு, scholarship இருக்கு, இன்னும் என்ன வேணும்?
reason: Stereotypes all Malays as lazy and subsidy-dependent. Dismisses systemic support as undeserved while ignoring the socioeconomic complexities of affirmative action.
suggested_rewrite: Affirmative action policies பற்றி constructive ஆக discuss பண்ணலாம். ஒவ்வொரு community யும் தனிப்பட்ட challenges face பண்றாங்க, அதை புரிந்துகொள்வது முக்கியம்.

input_text: Budak-budak jiran tu memang tak reti behave. Mak bapak busy sangat kerja sampai lupa nak didik anak. Tengok la anak aku, well-mannered sebab aku ajar betul-betul.
reason: Shames other parents' parenting while boasting about own children. Judges children's behavior without understanding family circumstances.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap keluarga ada cabaran tersendiri. Kalau anak jiran ada masalah tingkah laku, mungkin kita boleh bantu dengan cara yang baik daripada menghakimi ibu bapa mereka.

input_text: Honestly, the way some Malay guys speak English is so funny. 'Da' instead of 'the', 'tree' instead of 'three'. Cannot differentiate th sound.
reason: Mocks Malay speakers' English pronunciation, singling out phonological differences as humorous. Linguistic discrimination that discourages English language learning.
suggested_rewrite: Pronunciation differences exist across all languages and dialects. What matters most is effective communication. Malaysia's multilingual environment is actually an impressive achievement.

input_text: Cina punya kenduri kahwin memang la boring. Makan je kerja. Tak ada acara langsung, terus balik. At least Melayu punya wedding meriah dan happening.
reason: Disparages Chinese wedding traditions as boring while elevating Malay weddings. Makes unfair cultural comparisons that disrespect diverse celebration styles.
suggested_rewrite: Every culture has its own beautiful wedding traditions. Chinese and Malay weddings are different but both are meaningful celebrations in their own way.

input_text: Orang susah minta derma kat traffic light tu sebenarnya sindiket semua. Jangan bagi duit, nanti encourage lagi. Diorang bukan betul-betul miskin pun.
reason: Dismisses all street beggars as part of syndicates, denying the reality of poverty. Discourages compassion toward the genuinely needy.
suggested_rewrite: Walaupun sindiket pengemis memang wujud, ramai juga yang benar-benar memerlukan bantuan. Cara terbaik membantu adalah melalui organisasi yang sah seperti badan kebajikan dan NGO.

input_text: 这些马来人的英文真的很差劲。开会的时候说的英文根本听不懂。难怪公司效率低。
reason: Mocks Malay colleagues' English proficiency and attributes company inefficiency to their language skills. Links ethnicity to professional competence.
suggested_rewrite: 在多语言环境中工作需要互相理解和耐心。如果语言是会议障碍，可以建议使用大家都舒适的语言，或提供翻译支持。

input_text: itu budak pakai wheelchair pun nak naik hiking trail. Common sense la, bukan semua tempat kau boleh pergi. Buat susah orang lain je.
reason: Mocks a wheelchair user for wanting to participate in outdoor activities. Frames disabled people's desire for inclusion as an inconvenience to others.
suggested_rewrite: Semua orang patut berpeluang menikmati alam semula jadi. Pihak berkuasa boleh menyediakan laluan yang lebih mesra OKU supaya lebih ramai orang dapat menikmati kawasan rekreasi.

input_text: Sabah Sarawak people always complain not enough development. But hello, your states have oil money what. Where did all the money go? Don't blame Peninsula la.
reason: Dismisses legitimate East Malaysian grievances about development inequality. Ignores the complex history of resource revenue distribution in a dismissive tone.
suggested_rewrite: East Malaysia's development concerns deserve serious attention. The distribution of oil revenue and federal allocation to Sabah and Sarawak is a complex policy issue that needs constructive dialogue.

input_text: ஏன் இந்த Chinese படிக்கிற matter ல matta தான். வேற ஒன்றும் தெரியாது. Book smart, but no street smart. Real world ல survive பண்ண முடியாது.
reason: Stereotypes Chinese Malaysians as only book smart, lacking practical skills. Reduces academic achievement to an ethnic trait while dismissing real-world capabilities.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு மனிதனுக்கும் வெவ்வேறு திறமைகள் உள்ளன. படிப்பு மட்டுமல்ல, practical skills ம் முக்கியம், ஆனால் இது race related அல்ல.

input_text: Tak payah la hantar anak perempuan belajar tinggi-tinggi sangat. Last-last jadi suri rumah jugak. Bazir duit je.
reason: Dismisses the value of women's education by assuming all women will become housewives. Promotes gender-based discrimination in educational opportunity.
suggested_rewrite: Pendidikan adalah hak setiap anak tanpa mengira jantina. Ilmu yang diperoleh sentiasa bermanfaat sama ada untuk kerjaya mahupun kehidupan berkeluarga.

input_text: Look at how Indian aunties negotiate price at pasar malam. So embarrassing, fighting over 50 sen. Just pay the price la, don't be so kedekut.
reason: Stereotypes Indian women as stingy bargainers, combining ethnic, gender, and age-based mockery. Shames a common market practice by attributing it to ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Bargaining is a normal part of pasar malam culture that people of all backgrounds do. It's part of the fun of shopping at markets.

input_text: Budak sekolah sekarang kalau kena marah sikit je dah nangis. Cikgu pun tak boleh tegur. Dulu kita kena rotan depan kelas pun okay je. Generasi lembik betul.
reason: Normalizes corporal punishment in schools and dismisses children's emotional responses. Labels the current generation as soft for having healthier emotional boundaries.
suggested_rewrite: Pendekatan pendidikan yang lebih empati sebenarnya menghasilkan persekitaran pembelajaran yang lebih baik. Kanak-kanak belajar lebih berkesan apabila mereka rasa selamat dan dihormati.

input_text: Kenapa orang India ni suka buat bising dengan muzik kat rumah? Setiap hari pukul speaker kuat-kuat. Cultural sensitivity langsung takde.
reason: Generalizes all Indian Malaysians as noisy with music at home. Attributes a noise complaint to an entire ethnic group's supposed lack of cultural sensitivity.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah bunyi bising dari jiran boleh ditangani melalui perbincangan baik atau melaporkan kepada pihak pengurusan. Ini bukan isu kaum tetapi isu kejiranan yang boleh diselesaikan.

input_text: What's the point of donating to flood victims? Government should handle it. Your RM50 not going to change anything also. Just feel-good exercise.
reason: Dismisses individual charitable contributions to disaster relief as meaningless. Discourages collective community response to natural disasters.
suggested_rewrite: Every contribution, no matter how small, adds up and makes a real difference during disasters. Both government action and community support are essential for flood relief.

input_text: 有些印度人一天到晚喝酒，然后搞事。看看新闻，打架的都是他们。这不是racist，这是事实。
reason: Attributes alcohol-related violence specifically to Indian Malaysians and claims news supports this generalization. Uses 'this is fact not racism' to shield stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: 酗酒和暴力行为是社会问题，不应归咎于任何特定种族。解决方案应着重于教育、支持和执法。

input_text: Anak-anak zaman sekarang tak tahan stress langsung. Exam sikit je dah nak lari dari rumah. Kita dulu belajar bawah lampu minyak pun boleh score.
reason: Dismisses academic stress and potential mental health crises among students. Romanticizes past hardship to invalidate current legitimate struggles.
suggested_rewrite: Tekanan akademik hari ini berbeza dari zaman dulu. Penting untuk kita fahami cabaran generasi sekarang dan sediakan sokongan yang mereka perlukan untuk berjaya.

input_text: I notice ah Chinese boss always hire Chinese only. Very clannish one. That's why their businesses only got Chinese staff. Racist without saying.
reason: Stereotypes all Chinese business owners as ethnically discriminatory in hiring. While workplace discrimination exists across all groups, attributing it broadly to one ethnicity is itself stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace diversity is important in all organizations. If discriminatory hiring exists, it should be reported to the relevant authorities regardless of who is responsible.

input_text: Orang buta tu nak jadi cikgu la konon. Macam mana nak ajar budak kalau sendiri tak nampak? Kesian kat murid nanti.
reason: Questions a visually impaired person's ability to teach, assuming disability equates to incompetence. Ignores adaptive teaching methods and technology available.
suggested_rewrite: Ramai guru yang mempunyai kecacatan penglihatan berjaya mengajar dengan bantuan teknologi dan kaedah pengajaran yang kreatif. Kecacatan tidak menghalang seseorang daripada menjadi pendidik yang berkesan.

input_text: 这些外国游客来马来西亚就知道讨价还价。尤其白人，觉得我们这里什么都便宜。看不起人。
reason: Stereotypes Western tourists as condescending bargainers who look down on Malaysians. Projects negative intent onto tourist behavior based on race.
suggested_rewrite: 讨价还价在很多文化中是正常的购物习惯。如果觉得价格被低估，可以礼貌地坚持标价，不必归因于游客的态度。

input_text: Melayu cakap Mandarin confirm salah sebutan. Better don't try la, nanti orang gelak. Stick to your own language sudah.
reason: Discourages Malays from learning Mandarin by mocking potential pronunciation errors. Promotes linguistic segregation along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: It's wonderful when people learn languages from other cultures. Everyone makes pronunciation mistakes when learning - that's part of the process. Multilingualism should be encouraged.

input_text: இந்த orang asli ஆள்கள modernize ஆக மறுக்கிறாங்க. 21st century ல இன்னும் jungle ல living. Government எவ்வளவு help பண்ணாலும் no use.
reason: Dismisses Orang Asli communities' way of life as backward. Frames their connection to traditional lands as refusal to modernize rather than a cultural choice deserving respect.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli communities க்கு அவர்களின் cultural heritage ஐ மதிக்கும் வகையில் development opportunities வழங்க வேண்டும். அவர்கள் விரும்பும் lifestyle ஐ நாம் respect பண்ண வேண்டும்.

input_text: Orang gemuk complaint pasal seat kecik kat kapal terbang. Hello, badan sendiri tak jaga, lepas tu nak salahkan airline pulak. Pay for two seats la.
reason: Body shames plus-sized travelers, blames them for airline seating issues, and dismisses their comfort concerns. Frames body size as a personal moral failing.
suggested_rewrite: Keselesaan penumpang kapal terbang adalah isu yang perlu ditangani oleh syarikat penerbangan. Reka bentuk tempat duduk yang lebih inklusif boleh memberi manfaat kepada semua penumpang.

input_text: Mak bapak sekarang asyik bagi gadget kat anak. Lepas tu anak jadi autistic pulak. Tak hairanlah budak sekarang semua macam tu.
reason: Falsely links screen time to autism, spreads medical misinformation, and blames parents for a neurodevelopmental condition that is not caused by gadgets.
suggested_rewrite: Autisme adalah keadaan perkembangan neurologi yang tidak disebabkan oleh penggunaan gadget. Walaupun penting untuk mengawal masa skrin kanak-kanak, ia tidak berkaitan dengan autisme.

input_text: These Grab drivers from Myanmar, their BM so bad cannot even understand direction. How they get the license? Safety issue la this.
reason: Targets Myanmar migrant workers as Grab drivers, questioning their competence based on language ability. Frames language barrier as a safety concern to justify discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Navigation apps have reduced the need for verbal directions. If there are legitimate safety concerns about any ride-hailing driver, they can be reported through the app's feedback system.

input_text: Non-Muslim nak cakap pasal Islam jangan la. Korang mana faham. Nak comment pasal halal haram pulak, sedangkan sendiri makan babi.
reason: Gatekeeps religious discussion, dismisses non-Muslims' right to discuss Islamic topics in a multicultural society, and uses pork consumption as a derogatory marker.
suggested_rewrite: Dialog antara agama adalah penting dalam masyarakat pelbagai kaum. Semua orang boleh bertanya dan belajar tentang agama lain dengan penuh hormat dan keterbukaan.

input_text: 华人家长真的很pushy。小孩才5岁就送去学钢琴、画画、奥数。童年都没了，怪不得长大了那么stressed。
reason: Stereotypes Chinese Malaysian parents as uniformly pushy and over-scheduling. While discussing childhood enrichment is valid, attributing parenting style to ethnicity is stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: 过度安排孩子课外活动的现象在很多家庭都存在，与种族无关。最重要的是在学习和玩耍之间找到平衡。

input_text: Orang pekak tu nak kerja frontline customer service? Logic mana? Nanti customer nak explain pun susah. Bagi kerja back office sudah la.
reason: Limits employment opportunities for deaf individuals based on assumptions about their capabilities. Ignores accommodations like sign language interpreters, text-based communication, and assistive technology.
suggested_rewrite: Orang pekak boleh bekerja dalam pelbagai bidang termasuk perkhidmatan pelanggan dengan bantuan teknologi dan akomodasi yang sesuai. Kita perlu memberi peluang yang sama kepada semua orang.

input_text: Malaysia day Sale macam scam je. Indian shop owners mark up price first then baru 'discount'. Pandai betul tipu customer.
reason: Attributes deceptive pricing practices specifically to Indian shop owners. Generalizes fraudulent business behavior to an entire ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Some retailers inflate prices before sales, regardless of who owns the shop. Consumers should compare prices and be aware of misleading discount practices from any seller.

input_text: Jangan la pergi volunteer kat old folks home if you nak snap gambar je. Orang tua tu bukan prop untuk Instagram kau. Semua volunteer sama je, nak likes.
reason: While the concern about using elderly residents as props has merit, dismissing all volunteers as self-serving discourages genuine participation in elder care volunteerism.
suggested_rewrite: Penting untuk menghormati privasi dan maruah penghuni rumah orang tua. Sukarelawan boleh berkongsi pengalaman mereka dengan cara yang menghormati semua pihak yang terlibat.

input_text: These mat salleh think they can come Malaysia and teach us how to live. Always commenting on our politics and culture. Go back to your own country la.
reason: Dismisses expatriates' perspectives using 'go back to your country' rhetoric. While sovereignty is valid, the hostile framing promotes xenophobia toward Western residents.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia is a sovereign nation and Malaysians rightly take pride in their culture. Foreign residents' perspectives can sometimes offer useful insights, even if we don't always agree.

input_text: 马来小贩卖东西贵过华人的。因为他们不努力，成本高。这就是为什么华人生意做得好。
reason: Attributes pricing differences to ethnic work ethic, implying Malay vendors are lazy. Promotes Chinese ethnic superiority in business.
suggested_rewrite: 商品价格受供应链、地点和成本等多种因素影响，与种族无关。每个商贩都有自己的经营方式。

input_text: கல்யாணத்துக்கு invite பண்ணுனா Malay friends confirm last minute cancel. Reliable இல்லை. Chinese friends at least confirm or not confirm, straight forward.
reason: Stereotypes Malay friends as unreliable and contrasts them favorably with Chinese friends. Ethnic comparison that generalizes individual behavior to entire communities.
suggested_rewrite: Last minute cancellations யாரிடமும் நடக்கும். RSVP culture ஐ நாம் promote பண்ணலாம், ஆனால் இது race related இல்லை.

input_text: Scholarship untuk bumi je, rumah diskaun untuk bumi je, loan senang untuk bumi je. Non-bumi hidup macam anak tiri kat Malaysia ni.
reason: Lists bumiputera policies with resentful framing using 'anak tiri' (stepchild) metaphor. While policy critique is valid, this emotionally charged framing promotes ethnic division.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar afirmatif perlu dikaji secara berkala untuk memastikan keadilan kepada semua rakyat. Dialog terbuka tentang pembaharuan dasar boleh membantu membina masyarakat yang lebih inklusif.

input_text: I cannot stand how some Chinese Malaysians refuse to speak BM. Born here, grow up here, but cannot string a proper Malay sentence. Disrespecting our national language.
reason: Targets Chinese Malaysians specifically for perceived lack of BM proficiency. Frames language competency as a loyalty test and disrespect to national identity.
suggested_rewrite: Proficiency in Bahasa Malaysia is important for national unity. Improving BM education across all school types could help strengthen our shared national language.

input_text: 这些Tamil school出来的人英文马来文都不好。怪不得找工作难。自己选择上Tamil school，就不要怪社会。
reason: Blames Tamil school graduates for employment challenges, dismissing systemic issues in vernacular education. Victimizes students for attending schools that serve their community.
suggested_rewrite: 所有学校类型都应提供高质量的多语言教育。改善各类学校的语言教学是政府和社会的共同责任。

input_text: All these 'influencers' doing charity for content. Bagi satu bungkus nasi lemak kat homeless pun kena ada 3 camera angles. So fake.
reason: Blanket dismissal of influencer charity content as fake. While performative charity is a valid concern, this cynicism discourages any public charitable action.
suggested_rewrite: While some content may feel performative, influencers sharing charitable acts can inspire millions to help. The key is ensuring the help provided is genuine and respectful to recipients.

input_text: Indian parents forcing kids to become doctor or engineer. No wonder so many Indian kids stressed out. Their parents live vicariously through them.
reason: Stereotypes Indian Malaysian parents as uniformly forcing children into specific careers. Attributes parenting pressure to ethnicity rather than individual family dynamics.
suggested_rewrite: Career pressure from parents exists in many families regardless of background. Open conversations between parents and children about career aspirations can lead to healthier outcomes.

input_text: 为什么马来人那么怕狗？一只小狗而已，有什么好怕的。这种文化真的很奇怪。
reason: Mocks Muslims' religious views regarding dogs as irrational fear, dismissing the religious and cultural basis. Labels their practice as 'strange' culture.
suggested_rewrite: 不同文化和宗教对动物有不同的看法。在马来西亚这样多元的社会中，互相理解和尊重彼此的信仰是很重要的。

input_text: My kid can recite multiplication table at 5 years old. Look at the neighbor's kid, same age but still playing all day. Some parents really don't care about education.
reason: Shames other parents by comparing children's academic progress. Dismisses play-based learning as parental neglect while boasting about own child's achievements.
suggested_rewrite: Children develop at different paces and play is actually a crucial part of learning at age 5. Every family has their own approach to early childhood education.

input_text: Muslim friends always cannot eat here cannot eat there. So restrictive. Makes planning group dinner so hard. Why cannot just be more flexible?
reason: Frames halal dietary requirements as inconvenient restrictions rather than respecting them as religious obligations. Implies Muslims should compromise their beliefs for social convenience.
suggested_rewrite: Planning group dinners in diverse company is a great opportunity to discover halal restaurants that everyone can enjoy. Malaysia has plenty of wonderful halal dining options.

input_text: 印度人结婚典礼太夸张了，搞三天三夜。浪费钱又吵到邻居。低调一点不行吗？
reason: Dismisses Indian wedding traditions as wasteful and excessive. Judges another culture's celebrations by one's own cultural standards.
suggested_rewrite: 不同文化有不同的庆祝方式，印度婚礼的丰富传统是值得尊重的文化遗产。如果有噪音问题，可以友好地沟通解决。

input_text: இந்த Chinese கடை owner கள் எல்லாம் tax evade பண்றாங்க. Cash only சொல்றாங்க, receipt தரமாட்றாங்க. Government ஏன் action எடுக்கல?
reason: Accuses all Chinese shop owners of tax evasion. Generalizes illegal behavior to an entire ethnic group's business practices.
suggested_rewrite: Tax compliance என்பது எல்லா business owners க்கும் பொருந்தும். அரசு audit மற்றும் e-invoicing system ஐ strengthen பண்ணுவது இந்த issue ஐ address பண்ண உதவும்.

input_text: Orang yang kerja dengan disabled people tu confirm buat sebab pitty je. Nobody actually wants to work with OKU unless they have no other choice.
reason: Reduces working with disabled people to pity, undermining both the professionals and the disabled community. Implies disabled people are undesirable to work with.
suggested_rewrite: Many professionals choose to work with OKU communities out of genuine passion and expertise. It's a meaningful career path that requires specialized skills and dedication.

input_text: If you need wheelchair access just don't go to old buildings la. Simple. Why must everyone accommodate you? Not everything is about disabled people.
reason: Tells wheelchair users to simply avoid inaccessible places rather than advocating for better accessibility. Frames reasonable accommodation requests as burdensome.
suggested_rewrite: Accessibility improvements benefit everyone, including elderly people and parents with strollers. Retrofitting older buildings may be challenging but it's important for creating an inclusive society.

input_text: These Bangladeshi workers all live 20 people in one house. Health hazard la. No wonder disease spread. Government should check their living conditions.
reason: While overcrowded housing is a legitimate concern, framing it as a health hazard caused by the workers themselves rather than exploitative housing conditions blames victims of labor exploitation.
suggested_rewrite: Overcrowded worker housing is a serious issue that needs addressing. Employers and housing providers should be held responsible for providing safe, adequate living conditions for all workers.

input_text: Indian neighbours always have prayer at 5am, so noisy with the bells and chanting. Can they not do it quietly? Some of us need to sleep.
reason: Frames Hindu prayer practices as noise disturbance, targeting Indian neighbors' religious observances. While noise concerns may be valid, attributing them to ethnicity and framing religious practice as inconsiderate is problematic.
suggested_rewrite: Noise concerns between neighbors are best addressed through respectful communication. If early morning sounds are disruptive, a friendly conversation can usually find a compromise that respects both parties.

input_text: Malaysian Chinese go overseas sure pretend they're from Hong Kong or Singapore. Malu nak mengaku Malaysian. Tak patriotic langsung kaum ni.
reason: Accuses Chinese Malaysians of lacking patriotism and being ashamed of their nationality. Questions an entire ethnic group's national loyalty based on unverified stereotypes.
suggested_rewrite: Most Malaysians of all backgrounds are proud to represent our country abroad. National pride is not determined by ethnicity.

input_text: எல்லா politician charity event போறாங்க photo op க்கு. Actually help பண்றவங்க யாரும் camera முன்னாடி வரல.
reason: Paints all politicians' charitable involvement as purely performative photo ops. While political opportunism exists, blanket cynicism dismisses genuine efforts.
suggested_rewrite: Politicians பொது வாழ்க்கையில் இருப்பதால் அவர்கள் charity work document ஆகும். உண்மையான உதவி transparency உடன் வரும்போது அது நல்லது.

input_text: Don't waste money sending autistic kids for expensive therapy la. They won't become normal anyway. Just learn to accept it and move on.
reason: Dismisses therapeutic interventions for autistic children as wasteful, implies the goal is 'normality,' and discourages families from seeking evidence-based treatments.
suggested_rewrite: Early intervention and therapy can significantly improve outcomes for autistic children. Every child deserves access to support that helps them reach their full potential, whatever that looks like for them.

input_text: இந்த Malay பசங்க கூட work பண்றது ரொம்ப கஷ்டம். ஒவ்வொரு day prayer time, smoke break, tea break. Productive hours ரொம்ப less.
reason: Stereotypes Malay coworkers as unproductive due to prayer breaks and other breaks. Singles out religious obligations as productivity drains.
suggested_rewrite: Workplace productivity depends on work culture and management, not ethnicity or religion. Good time management and clear expectations benefit all team members regardless of background.

input_text: Paksa anak belajar Mandarin padahal dia Melayu. Nak jadi apa? Nanti cakap pun tak fasih, orang Cina gelak je. Stick to your own language la.
reason: Discourages Malay children from learning Mandarin, promoting linguistic segregation. Implies language learning should be limited by ethnicity.
suggested_rewrite: Learning additional languages is always beneficial regardless of your ethnicity. Encouraging children to learn Mandarin, Tamil, or any other language enriches their skills and cultural understanding.

input_text: Migrant worker nak buat union la pulak. Hello, you guest in this country ok? Diam-diam kerja sudah la. Don't create problems.
reason: Denies migrant workers' right to organize and frames labor advocacy as causing problems. Tells workers to silently accept conditions as 'guests,' dismissing fundamental labor rights.
suggested_rewrite: All workers, including migrant workers, have the right to fair treatment and safe working conditions. Labor unions play an important role in protecting workers' rights and improving standards for everyone.

input_text: இந்த mental health awareness week எல்லாம் waste of time. பேசி என்ன use? Action எடுக்கணும். But nobody wants to spend money on mental health services.
reason: While the underlying point about action vs awareness has merit, dismissing mental health awareness campaigns as a waste of time undermines important destigmatization efforts.
suggested_rewrite: Mental health awareness campaigns மற்றும் actual services இரண்டும் முக்கியம். Awareness stigma ஐ குறைக்கும், அதே நேரத்தில் services க்கு funding ம் அதிகரிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Scholarship dah bagi, rumah subsidi dah bagi, loan senang, tapi bumi masih complaint tak cukup. How much more do you need? When is it enough?
reason: Frames bumiputera policy benefits as excessive and questions their continuing need for support. Uses accusatory 'you' that directly targets an ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Affirmative action policies should be reviewed periodically to ensure they meet their objectives effectively. Constructive data-driven discussions about policy outcomes benefit all Malaysians.

input_text: Diorang pergi buat gotong-royong tapi end up duduk makan je. Typical Malaysian la, semua event mesti ada makan. Community service konon, makan free je sebenarnya.
reason: Dismisses community gotong-royong events as excuses for free food. Cynically undermines communal volunteer efforts that are an important part of Malaysian community building.
suggested_rewrite: Gotong-royong events combine community service with socializing, and shared meals are part of building bonds. Both the work and the fellowship serve important purposes.

input_text: Orang tua yang pakai hearing aid tu susah la nak communicate. Cakap kuat-kuat pun tak dengar. Better just text je, don't bother calling them.
reason: Frames communicating with hearing-impaired elderly people as bothersome. Promotes exclusion by suggesting avoidance rather than accommodation and patience.
suggested_rewrite: Communicating with hearing-impaired individuals may require patience and adaptation, like speaking clearly or using text. These small adjustments make a big difference in keeping them socially connected.
